title: astragalus salsula
intro: Astragalus salsula, also known as saltwort milk vetch, is a perennial herb that belongs to the legume family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus salsula include improving cardiovascular health, boosting the immune system, and reducing stress and fatigue. Herbal preparations of Astragalus salsula can be found in supplements, teas, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
